Requirement Description: The system shall generate a personalized monthly budget.
The plan shall allocate funds to categories.
The user shall be able to modify allocations.
The AI shall adapt future recommendations based on spending behavior.
The system shall notify users when budget thresholds are reached.
The system shall suggest savings transfers.
Users shall be able to enable/disable categories of alerts.
The system shall support full voice input and output.
The user can choose between using voice or touch commands
The app shall have a 'Tinder' style page for the user to choose between budgeting goals
The user can choose between Budgeting/Emergency Fund/ Financial Literacy goals
The system shall store selected motivation locally.
The app shall send budget reminder notifications at 'high risk' times
Users shall manually log purchases.
Users shall categorize purchases.
The system shall update budget balances in real time.
The AI shall respond conversationally.
All AI processing shall occur locally.
No financial data shall be transmitted externally.
The system shall not require bank API connections.
The system shall not store credentials for financial institutions.
The system shall allow notification tone customization.
The system shall support summary-only mode.
The system shall minimize alert frequency in summary mode.
The AI shall detect high-risk times.
The system shall trigger intervention notifications.
